personalInfo.title: Solution Architect | React Architect | Frontend Lead | Next.js | React Native | AI Engineer | 15+ Yrs
personalInfo.location: Dubai, UAE | Open to relocation across EU
personalInfo.summary: **Solution Architect & React Architect** with **15+ years** building **high-scale SaaS platforms** and **cloud-native applications** for **Fortune 500 enterprises**. Expert in **Frontend Architecture (React, Next.js, Micro Frontends)**, **React Native mobile development**, and **AI/LLM Integration (RAG, Vector DBs)**. Proven hands-on engineering leader driving **end-to-end product development** and **cross-functional and distributed team delivery** across **web, iOS, and Android**. Track record of **optimizing system performance by 40%**, **reducing infrastructure costs by 25%**, and delivering **production-grade AI solutions**. Open to relocation across EU (Netherlands, Belgium, Ireland, Sweden, Denmark).

workAuthorization: Requires EU work authorization / visa sponsorship
gdprNotice: Data processed in accordance with GDPR. Personal data provided with consent for recruitment purposes only.

additionalSections.targetCountries: Open to opportunities in Netherlands, Belgium, Ireland, Sweden, Denmark
